ddls:
CREATE TABLE "academic_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic level (e.g., Kindergarten, Elementary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the academic level */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic level */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee type */,
  "fee_name" TEXT /* Name of the fee (e.g., Registration Fee, Tuition Fee) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fee */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., one-time, recurring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuition_fees" (
  "tuition_fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tuition fee */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic level */,
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fee type */,
  "regular_fee" TEXT /* Regular tuition fee amount */,
  "late_fee" TEXT /* Late tuition fee amount */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount amount (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tuition_fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuition_fees_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES academic_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials_fees" (
  "materials_fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each materials fee */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic level */,
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fee type */,
  "materials_fee" TEXT /* Materials fee amount */,
  "materials_list" TEXT /* List of materials included in the fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("materials_fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_fees_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES academic_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accreditation_fees" (
  "accreditation_fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accreditation fee */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic level */,
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fee type */,
  "accreditation_fee" TEXT /* Accreditation fee amount */,
  "accreditation_agency" TEXT /* Accreditation agency (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accreditation_fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accreditation_fees_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES academic_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registration_fees" (
  "registration_fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration fee */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic level */,
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fee type */,
  "registration_fee" TEXT /* Registration fee amount */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Registration deadline date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registration_fees_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES academic_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "academic_level" INTEGER /* ID of the academic level the student belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the student's parent */,
  "parent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the student's parent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_academic_level FOREIGN KEY ("academic_level") REFERENCES academic_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year of enrollment */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "amount_paid" TEXT /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_schedules" (
  "payment_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment schedule */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic level */,
  "payment_schedule" TEXT /* Payment schedule details */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Payment frequency (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_schedules_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES academic_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, accountant, academic staff) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method details (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  "payment_provider" TEXT /* Payment provider (e.g., PayPal, Stripe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date of invoice */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount due */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_invoices_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "invoice_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice item */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item (e.g., tuition fee, materials fee) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES student_invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scholarships" (
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scholarship */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "scholarship_name" TEXT /* Name of the scholarship */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the scholarship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scholarship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scholarships_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "discount_name" TEXT /* Name of the discount */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refunds" (
  "refund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refund */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the refund */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date of the refund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refunds_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
